name: Olive Garden Chicken Spiedies
recipeIngredient: Chicken breasts, boned and skinned (1.5 lb), cut into 1x1-inch squares
Red bell peppers (3 large), halved crosswise, 72 strips
Green bell peppers (2 large), halved crosswise, 48 strips
Yellow onion (1 large), halved crosswise, 96 pieces
Bamboo skewers (8 inches long), soaked in water overnight
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-aluminum mixing bowl, combine olive oil, red wine vinegar, sugar, minced garlic, Dijon mustard, salt, pepper, dried tarragon, and dried oregano. Mix thoroughly until the sugar and salt are completely dissolved.
2. Pound the chicken breasts between sheets of waxed paper until an even thickness of 3/16 inch overall.
3. Cut the chicken into 1-inch squares and add to the marinade, covering completely. Allow to marinate for 2 hours in the refrigerator.
4. Remove from the marinade after 2 hours and drain.
5. Assemble the spiedies by placing a red bell pepper strip, onion piece, chicken (folded into "C" shape on the skewer), green bell pepper piece, onion piece, and second chicken portion alternately on each skewer. Finish with another red bell pepper strip after the 4th piece of chicken on each skewer.
6. Spread the assembled spiedies out on a grill or griddle and cook approximately 1 minute per side, turning 4 times. Adjust timing according to your equipment's heat output.
7. Serve immediately, about 4 per serving, with dipping sauce (1/4 cup per serving).
8. Sauce: Mix all ingredients together just until blended. Chill for 1-2 hours to blend flavors. Serve cold.
